title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Cake Tin, Round Sandwich Pan with Loose Base for Easy Release, Fridge and Freezer Safe. Grey, 20cm, 8 Inch
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean, round cake tin is ideal for sponges, desserts, cakes, cheesecakes and pies, handwash recommended
EASY RELEASE WITH REMOVABLE BASE: With the loose base design, storing and baking cakes couldn't be any easier, perfect size 20.5 x 5 cm

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Cake Tin can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer; The ability to go from freezer to oven is ideal for pre baking, and reheating from frozen when needed to keep baked goods fresher for longer
NON-STICK: Remove baked cakes with ease with this quality non stick coating; Releases cakes and bakes time and time again; The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free

DURABLE: The cake pan is made from Alloy steel and is a made of 2 thick parts, the outer ring and the loose base product making it built to last. Ideal size measuring 20.5 x 5 and inner size of 19.6 x 5 cm
